title: Add an UNDO button when importing google sheets file
excerpt: I imported a Google Sheet csv file and requested that it replaced duplicate names. next thing I know, ALL of my original cells were replaced, including all of the statuses replaced. I was told there is no undo button for…

posts.author: lilymendelson (Lily Mendelson)
posts.cookedHtml: I imported a Google Sheet csv file and requested that it replaced duplicate names. next thing I know, ALL of my original cells were replaced, including all of the statuses replaced. I was told there is no undo button for this, in order to go back to my original list. A weeks worth of work… gone.
